title: REDEMPTION HOUSE - 211info
text: REDEMPTION HOUSE MINISTRIES REDEMPTION HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional shelter with a maximum capacity of 17 individuals. A shower and load of laundry is offered for guests. Dinner and sack breakfast provided for people staying overnight. 780 E 1st Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older who are experiencing homelessness or have minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 4pm-8am Email (541) 362-5642 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 362-5642 Main phone Main phone (541) 362-5642 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - CRAIG'S COMPASSIONATE CAFE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
